ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Placidi Reynae In publico messanensi Gymnasio Naturalis Philosophiae E Prima Sede Professoris Proloquium
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: In exornando Philosophiae, & Medicinae Laurea Ioanne petro Corvino Petri Castelli Romani Nepote.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The author mentions various members of Neapolitan academies
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
